sourceTitle: Tinkercad Tutorial - How To Make A Small 3D Cat
modeledFrom: 00:28 Body: Add a sphere, scale it to 35 mm wide, 42 mm long, and 20 mm tall.
00:41 Eyes: Add a 4 mm eye, raise it 10 mm, move it to the front, then copy, paste, and mirror it.
00:58 Front legs: Use a paraboloid, rotate it 112.5 degrees, scale it to 8 mm wide, 18.95 mm long, and 7.95 mm tall, then mirror the pair.
01:33 Back legs: Use another paraboloid, rotate it 135 degrees, scale it to 10.02 mm wide, 17.77 mm long, and 12 mm tall, angle it 22.5 degrees, then mirror it.
02:14 Ears: Use paraboloids scaled to 7 mm wide, 10 mm long, and 8 mm tall, then rotate and mirror them above the eyes.
02:38 Tail: Use a donut slice, rotate it 90 degrees and 22.5 degrees, then place it at the back of the body.
02:59 Nose: Use a roof shape scaled to 1 mm wide, 5 mm long, and 1 mm tall, rotate it 90 degrees, and place it between the eyes.
